---
title: "NotebookLM — account-1 — Data Profile"
subtitle: "Catalogo descritivo dos 8 parquets do parser v3 (so account-1, en)"
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| code-summary: "Setup — paths, conexao DuckDB, helpers"

import sys
from pathlib import Path

_this = Path.cwd()
_project_root = _this if (_this / "src").exists() else _this.parent
sys.path.insert(0, str(_project_root))

import json
import pandas as pd
import duckdb
import plotly.graph_objects as go
from itables import init_notebook_mode, show

init_notebook_mode(all_interactive=False)

ACCOUNT_FILTER = "1"

PROCESSED = _project_root / "data" / "processed" / "NotebookLM"
con = duckdb.connect()

# Tabelas com coluna account → filtra direto
for table in ("conversations", "messages", "notes", "outputs", "guide_questions"):
    p = PROCESSED / f"notebooklm_{table}.parquet"
    if p.exists():
        con.execute(
            f"CREATE VIEW {table} AS "
            f"SELECT * FROM read_parquet('{p}') WHERE account = '{ACCOUNT_FILTER}'"
        )

# Tabelas sem account → filtra via conversation_id
for table, fk in [("tool_events", "conversation_id"), ("branches", "conversation_id")]:
    p = PROCESSED / f"notebooklm_{table}.parquet"
    if p.exists():
        con.execute(
            f"CREATE VIEW {table} AS "
            f"SELECT * FROM read_parquet('{p}') "
            f"WHERE {fk} IN (SELECT conversation_id FROM conversations)"
        )

# Sources usa project_id (= conversation_id)
p = PROCESSED / "notebooklm_sources.parquet"
if p.exists():
    con.execute(
        "CREATE VIEW sources AS "
        f"SELECT * FROM read_parquet('{p}') "
        "WHERE project_id IN (SELECT conversation_id FROM conversations)"
    )

# NotebookLM palette: laranja Google + secundario
SOURCE_COLOR = "#F4B400"   # Google Yellow/Orange (NotebookLM brand)
SECONDARY = "#DB8B00"      # Darker orange
ACCENT = "#EA8600"         # Saturated
MUTED = "#FBE9B7"          # Light orange


def fmt_pct(n, total):
    pct = n / total * 100 if total else 0
    return f"{n:,}/{total:,} ({pct:.0f}%)"


def show_df(df, **kwargs):
    from IPython.display import display
    display(df.style.hide(axis="index"))


def plotly_bar(x, y, title, color=SOURCE_COLOR, height=350, orientation="v"):
    if orientation == "h":
        fig = go.Figure(go.Bar(y=x, x=y, marker_color=color, orientation="h"))
    else:
        fig = go.Figure(go.Bar(x=x, y=y, marker_color=color))
    fig.update_layout(
        title=title, height=height, template="plotly_white",
        margin=dict(t=50, b=40, l=40, r=20),
    )
    return fig
```

# Visao geral

```{python}
#| label: overview

totals = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM conversations) AS conversations,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages) AS messages,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tool_events) AS tool_events,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM branches) AS branches,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sources) AS sources,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notes) AS notes,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM outputs) AS outputs,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM guide_questions) AS guide_questions
""").df()

show_df(pd.DataFrame([
    {"Tabela": "conversations.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['conversations'].iloc[0]:,}"},
    {"Tabela": "messages.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['messages'].iloc[0]:,}"},
    {"Tabela": "tool_events.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['tool_events'].iloc[0]:,}"},
    {"Tabela": "branches.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['branches'].iloc[0]:,}"},
    {"Tabela": "sources.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['sources'].iloc[0]:,}"},
    {"Tabela": "notes.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['notes'].iloc[0]:,}"},
    {"Tabela": "outputs.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['outputs'].iloc[0]:,}"},
    {"Tabela": "guide_questions.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['guide_questions'].iloc[0]:,}"},
]))
```

> **Sobre este documento.** Catalogo descritivo dos 8 parquets do NotebookLM
> filtrados pra **account-1** (en, original "hello"). Para a visao
> consolidada das 2 contas, ver `notebooklm.qmd`.
>
> NotebookLM nao eh chat puro — cada notebook gera ate 9 tipos de outputs
> distintos (audio, blog, video, flashcards, quiz, data table, slide deck,
> infographic, mind map). Schema canonico (Conversation/Message/ToolEvent/
> Branch) eh complementado por 4 tabelas auxiliares (sources, notes,
> outputs, guide_questions) pra capturar essa especificidade.
>
> `guide.summary` vira system message (sequence=0) em todo notebook —
> garante `message_count >= 1` mesmo quando chat=None.

# 1. Cobertura

## 1.1 Notebooks com chat real

```{python}
#| label: chat-coverage

# Cada notebook gera 1 system msg (guide.summary). Notebooks com chat real
# tem msgs adicionais com role=user/assistant.
cov = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        COUNT(DISTINCT conversation_id) AS total_convs,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN role IN ('user','assistant') THEN conversation_id END) AS with_chat,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN role='system' THEN conversation_id END) AS with_summary
    FROM messages
""").df()

total = int(cov["total_convs"].iloc[0])
with_chat = int(cov["with_chat"].iloc[0])
with_summary = int(cov["with_summary"].iloc[0])

show_df(pd.DataFrame([
    {"Categoria": "Total notebooks", "Cobertura": f"{total:,}"},
    {"Categoria": "Com guide.summary (system msg)", "Cobertura": fmt_pct(with_summary, total)},
    {"Categoria": "Com chat real (user/assistant)", "Cobertura": fmt_pct(with_chat, total)},
]))
```

## 1.2 Cobertura de outputs por tipo

```{python}
#| label: output-coverage

types_df = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        output_type,
        output_type_name,
        COUNT(*) AS count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT conversation_id) AS notebooks
    FROM outputs
    GROUP BY output_type, output_type_name
    ORDER BY output_type
""").df()

if len(types_df):
    fig = plotly_bar(
        types_df["output_type_name"].tolist(),
        types_df["notebooks"].tolist(),
        f"Notebooks com cada tipo de output (de {total} totais)",
        color=SOURCE_COLOR,
    )
    fig.show()

show_df(types_df.rename(columns={
    "output_type": "Type", "output_type_name": "Nome",
    "count": "Outputs", "notebooks": "Notebooks",
}))
```

## 1.3 Sources por notebook

```{python}
#| label: sources-coverage

src_dist = con.execute("""
    SELECT project_id, COUNT(*) AS source_count, SUM(content_size) AS total_chars
    FROM sources
    GROUP BY project_id
    ORDER BY source_count DESC
""").df()

if len(src_dist):
    fig = plotly_bar(
        list(range(1, len(src_dist) + 1)),
        src_dist["source_count"].tolist(),
        f"Sources por notebook (top-{len(src_dist)} ordenados por count)",
        color=SECONDARY,
    )
    fig.update_xaxes(title="Notebook (rank)")
    fig.update_yaxes(title="Num sources")
    fig.show()

print(f"\nTotal sources: {len(con.execute('SELECT * FROM sources').df()):,}")
print(f"Conteudo extraido total: {int(src_dist['total_chars'].sum()):,} chars")
```

# 2. Outputs (9 tipos)

## 2.1 Distribuicao com tamanho de conteudo

```{python}
#| label: outputs-content

content_stats = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        output_type_name,
        COUNT(*) AS count,
        AVG(LENGTH(content)) AS avg_chars,
        SUM(LENGTH(content)) AS total_chars
    FROM outputs
    WHERE content IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY output_type_name
    ORDER BY count DESC
""").df()

show_df(content_stats.assign(
    avg_chars=content_stats["avg_chars"].fillna(0).astype(int),
    total_chars=content_stats["total_chars"].fillna(0).astype(int),
).rename(columns={
    "output_type_name": "Tipo", "count": "Com conteudo",
    "avg_chars": "Avg chars", "total_chars": "Total chars",
}))
```

## 2.2 Sample de output por tipo

```{python}
#| label: outputs-sample

samples = con.execute("""
    SELECT output_type_name, title, status, LENGTH(content) AS content_size
    FROM outputs
    ORDER BY output_type_name, content_size DESC NULLS LAST
""").df()

# Pega 1 row por tipo
top_per_type = samples.groupby("output_type_name").head(1).reset_index(drop=True)
show_df(top_per_type)
```

# 3. Sources

```{python}
#| label: sources-table

src = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        project_id,
        file_name,
        content_size,
        estimated_token_count
    FROM sources
    ORDER BY content_size DESC
    LIMIT 15
""").df()

show_df(src)
```

# 4. Guide questions

```{python}
#| label: guide-questions

q = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        conversation_id,
        question_text,
        order_,
        LENGTH(full_prompt) AS prompt_chars
    FROM (
        SELECT
            conversation_id,
            question_text,
            "order" AS order_,
            full_prompt
        FROM guide_questions
    )
    ORDER BY conversation_id, order_
    LIMIT 20
""").df()

show_df(q)

q_count = con.execute("""
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS questions, COUNT(DISTINCT conversation_id) AS notebooks
    FROM guide_questions
""").df()
print(f"\nTotal: {int(q_count['questions'].iloc[0])} questions em {int(q_count['notebooks'].iloc[0])} notebooks")
```

# 5. Notes

```{python}
#| label: notes-stats

n_stats = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        kind,
        COUNT(*) AS count,
        AVG(LENGTH(content)) AS avg_chars
    FROM notes
    GROUP BY kind
    ORDER BY count DESC
""").df()

if len(n_stats):
    show_df(n_stats.assign(
        avg_chars=n_stats["avg_chars"].fillna(0).astype(int),
    ))
else:
    print("Nenhuma note nesta conta.")
```

# 6. Preservation

```{python}
#| label: preservation

pres = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        is_preserved_missing,
        COUNT(*) AS count
    FROM conversations
    GROUP BY is_preserved_missing
""").df()

show_df(pres.rename(columns={"is_preserved_missing": "Preserved missing", "count": "Notebooks"}))
```

```{python}
#| label: preserved-list

preserved = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        conversation_id,
        title,
        last_seen_in_server
    FROM conversations
    WHERE is_preserved_missing = TRUE
    ORDER BY last_seen_in_server DESC
""").df()

if len(preserved):
    show_df(preserved)
else:
    print("Nenhum notebook preservado (deletado do servidor).")
```

---

**Account:** 1 (en) — original `hello`

**Render:** auto-gerado via Quarto. Para regenerar:
`QUARTO_PYTHON="$(pwd)/.venv/bin/python" quarto render notebooks/notebooklm-acc-1.qmd`
